# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you find a security vulnerability in this project, please **do not open a public GitHub issue**.

Instead, report it privately via GitHub's Security Advisory feature:
👉 https://github.com/dankadr/world-tracker/security/advisories/new

I'll respond as quickly as I can. Please include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- The potential impact

## Scope

This project is a personal side project. I'll do my best to address security issues promptly, but there are no SLAs or bug bounties.
